papers.title: Automated Design of Quantum Circuits (1998)
papers.description: the founding work of the field; evolves circuits with genetic programming (mutation, crossover, transposition).

papers.title: Evolutionary quantum architecture search for parametrized quantum circuits (2022)
papers.description: population-based genetic algorithm evolving PQCs for hybrid quantum-classical RL.

papers.title: Search space pruning for quantum architecture search (2022)
papers.description: ↳ see also [§5 Training-Free](#5-training-free--zero-cost-proxy-based-qas); listed there since its rotation-based indicator is a proxy, but the underlying search progressively prunes a population/candidate pool.

papers.title: Evolutionary-based quantum architecture search (2022)
papers.description: encodes circuits as binary "quantum genes" and evolves them.

papers.title: EQNAS: Evolutionary Quantum Neural Architecture Search for Image Classification (2023)
papers.description: quantum evolutionary algorithm with rotation-gate updates and interference crossover.

papers.title: Application of ZX-calculus to quantum architecture search (2024)
papers.description: Genetic Programming combined with ZX-calculus rewrite rules for circuit optimization.

papers.title: Trainability maximization using estimation of distribution algorithms assisted by surrogate modelling for quantum architecture search (2024)
papers.description: an Estimation-of-Distribution Algorithm (a population/probabilistic-model evolutionary method) guided by an online surrogate. ↳ also relevant to [§4 Predictor & Surrogate-Assisted](#4-predictor--surrogate-model-assisted-qas).

papers.title: DeQompile: quantum circuit decompilation using genetic programming for explainable quantum architecture search (2025)
papers.description: genetic-programming-based decompiler for explainable QAS.

papers.title: QuProFS: An Evolutionary Training-free Approach to Efficient Quantum Feature Map Search (2025)
papers.description: evolutionary search that ranks candidates with fast proxies instead of training. ↳ also relevant to [§5 Training-Free](#5-training-free--zero-cost-proxy-based-qas).

papers.title: Neural Architecture Search for Quantum Autoencoders (2025)
papers.description: genetic algorithm evolving gate types, layers, and parameters for autoencoder circuits.

papers.title: Noise-Aware Quantum Architecture Search Based on NSGA-II Algorithm (2026)
papers.description: variable-depth NSGA-II (multi-objective evolutionary algorithm), hybridized with an ε-greedy Hamiltonian strategy.

papers.title: Probabilistic Design of Parametrized Quantum Circuits through Local Gate Modifications (2026)
papers.description: probabilistic, evolution-inspired local gate mutations applied to existing circuits.

papers.title: Q-PhotoNAS: Hybrid Quantum Neural Architecture Search Framework on Photonic Devices (2026)
papers.description: genetic search combined with learnable quantum phase encoding for photonic circuits.

papers.title: Quantum architecture search via deep reinforcement learning (2021)
papers.description: A2C/PPO agent builds circuits for GHZ-state preparation from Pauli expectation values.

papers.title: Quantum Architecture Search via Continual Reinforcement Learning (2021)
papers.description: PPR-DQL reuses learned policies across changing noise environments.

papers.title: Quantum circuit optimization with deep reinforcement learning (2021)
papers.description: a CNN-based DRL agent learns hardware-specific circuit optimization strategies.

papers.title: Reinforcement learning for optimization of variational quantum circuit architectures (2021)
papers.description: feedback-driven curriculum learning balances expressivity and depth.

papers.title: Quantum architecture search via truly proximal policy optimization (2023)
papers.description: a rollback-clipped, trust-region-constrained variant of PPO for QAS.

papers.title: Quantum Reinforcement Learning for Quantum Architecture Search (2023)
papers.description: A3C agent for multi-qubit GHZ-state circuit construction.

papers.title: KANQAS: Kolmogorov-Arnold Network for Quantum Architecture Search (2024)
papers.description: RL-based QAS where the Q-network/policy uses KANs instead of MLPs.

papers.title: Quantum Machine Learning Architecture Search via Deep Reinforcement Learning (2024)
papers.description: RL discovers QML model architectures for supervised tasks under NISQ constraints.

papers.title: A quantum information theoretic analysis of reinforcement learning-assisted quantum architecture search (2024)
papers.description: analyzes entanglement, initial-condition, and correlation effects in RL-QAS for state diagonalization.

papers.title: Reinforcement learning-based architecture search for quantum machine learning (2024)
papers.description: sample-efficient model-based RL over a reduced, layered search space.

papers.title: An RNN-policy gradient approach for quantum architecture search (2024)
papers.description: RNN-based policy-gradient controller with layer-based search acceleration.

papers.title: Quantum Circuit Optimization with AlphaTensor (2024)
papers.description: deep RL minimizing T-count via tensor-decomposition-based circuit optimization.

papers.title: Challenges for Reinforcement Learning in Quantum Circuit Design (2024)
papers.description: an MDP-based RL benchmarking framework (QCD) comparing PPO, A2C, TD3, SAC.

papers.title: TensorRL-QAS: Reinforcement learning with tensor networks for scalable quantum architecture search (2025)
papers.description: RL warm-started from a matrix-product-state approximation, scaling to 20 qubits.

papers.title: Scaling the Automated Discovery of Quantum Circuits via Reinforcement Learning with Gadgets (2025)
papers.description: extends gadget-based RL for scalability to more complex circuits/codes.

papers.title: Improving thermal state preparation of Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev model with reinforcement learning on quantum hardware (2025)
papers.description: RL + CNNs with a composite entropy/energy reward for thermal-state circuits.

papers.title: QAS-QTNs: Curriculum Reinforcement Learning-Driven Quantum Architecture Search for Quantum Tensor Networks (2025)
papers.description: curriculum RL extended to benchmark multiple classical/quantum-enhanced agents.

papers.title: Quantum Architecture Search for Solving Quantum Machine Learning Tasks (2025)
papers.description: RL agent discovers low-complexity classification circuits.

papers.title: QASER: Breaking the Depth vs. Accuracy Trade-Off for Quantum Architecture Search (2025)
papers.description: RL with an exponential reward jointly optimizing depth, two-qubit gate count, and accuracy.

papers.title: Distributed quantum architecture search using multi-agent reinforcement learning (2025)
papers.description: multiple agents each control a local block of the circuit, reducing per-agent action-space dimensionality.

papers.title: Replay-buffer engineering for noise-robust quantum circuit optimization (2026)
papers.description: treats the RL replay buffer itself as the main lever (annealed prioritization, curriculum amortization, noiseless-to-noisy transfer).

papers.title: DQAS: Differentiable quantum architecture search (2021)
papers.description: the foundational differentiable/probabilistic-programming QAS framework.

papers.title: QuantumDARTS: Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search for Variational Quantum Algorithms (2023)
papers.description: Gumbel-Softmax relaxation with macro/micro search for scalable sub-circuit patterns.

papers.title: Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search for Quantum Reinforcement Learning (2023)
papers.description: applies DQAS-style differentiable optimization to quantum deep Q-learning.

papers.title: Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search in Asynchronous Quantum Reinforcement Learning (2024)
papers.description: joint gradient-based optimization of VQC structure and parameters, with asynchronous RL for throughput.

papers.title: SA-DQAS: Self-attention Enhanced Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search (2024)
papers.description: adds a self-attention mechanism to capture dependencies between gate placeholders in DQAS.

papers.title: Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search in Quantum-Enhanced Neural Network Parameter Generation (2025)
papers.description: differentiable QAS applied within the Quantum-Train (QT) parameter-generation framework.

papers.title: RhoDARTS: Differentiable Quantum Architecture Search with Density Matrix Simulations (2025)
papers.description: models search as evolution of a quantum mixed state rather than a discrete supernet.

papers.title: Quantum Long Short-term Memory with Differentiable Architecture Search (2025)
papers.description: end-to-end joint optimization of QLSTM circuit architecture and parameters.

papers.title: Differentiable Architecture Search for Adversarially Robust Quantum Computer Vision (2026)
papers.description: DQAS augmented with a trainable Classical Noise Layer, jointly learning structure and adversarial robustness.

papers.title: Neural predictor based quantum architecture search (2021)
papers.description: a neural predictor cuts required evaluations ~10× versus random search.

papers.title: A GNN-based predictor for quantum architecture search (2023)
papers.description: represents circuits as DAGs and uses a graph neural network to estimate performance.

papers.title: GSQAS: Graph Self-supervised Quantum Architecture Search (2023)
papers.description: self-supervised graph representation learning to overcome scarce labeled circuit data.

papers.title: Quantum Architecture Search with Unsupervised Representation Learning (2025)
papers.description: decouples unsupervised circuit-representation learning from the downstream search (REINFORCE or Bayesian Optimization). ↳ also relevant to [§6 Bayesian/Tree-Search](#6-bayesian-optimization--tree-search-based-qas) and [§2 RL](#2-reinforcement-learning-based-qas).

papers.title: Search space pruning for quantum architecture search (2022)
papers.description: rotation-based indicators progressively eliminate low-potential gates before costly evaluation.

papers.title: Training-Free Quantum Architecture Search (2024)
papers.description: a zero-cost path-based proxy filters candidates, followed by an expressibility-based proxy.

papers.title: Distributed quantum architecture search (2024)
papers.description: a two-stage training-free strategy (path-based proxy, then expressibility) adapted to multi-QPU circuits. ↳ also relevant to [§10 Hybrid/Other](#10-hybrid-agent-based--other-approaches) for its distributed-QPU contribution.

papers.title: Scalable Quantum Architecture Search via Landscape Analysis (2025)
papers.description: predicts circuit learnability from landscape-fluctuation statistics rather than training.

papers.title: Self-supervised representation learning for Bayesian quantum architecture search (2025)
papers.description: a GIN predictor pretrained on expressibility builds a latent space explored via Bayesian Optimization.

papers.title: Magic-Informed Quantum Architecture Search (2026)
papers.description: a GNN predictor of circuit "magic" (nonstabilizerness) steers a Monte Carlo Tree Search. ↳ also relevant to [§4 Predictor-Assisted](#4-predictor--surrogate-model-assisted-qas).

papers.title: QuantumNAS: Noise-Adaptive Search for Robust Quantum Circuits (2022)
papers.description: a SuperCircuit decouples circuit search from parameter training for noise-robust VQAs.

papers.title: Quantum circuit synthesis with diffusion models (2024)
papers.description: a text-conditioned denoising diffusion model generates quantum operations for gate-based circuits, avoiding exponential-cost dynamics simulation during training.

papers.title: Quantum optimization with a novel Gibbs objective function and ansatz architecture search (2020)
papers.description: redesigns the QAOA *objective function* (Gibbs objective) alongside an automated ansatz architecture search; the contribution is orthogonal to the search algorithm used.

papers.title: Quantum circuit architecture search for variational quantum algorithms (2022)
papers.description: an early, general QAS framework balancing expressivity and noise resilience for VQAs, hardware-validated on IBM devices; algorithmic mechanism not specific to one category above.

papers.title: Quantum Circuit Architecture Search on a Superconducting Processor (2022)
papers.description: a hardware demonstration of QAS-tailored hardware-efficient ansätze on an 8-qubit superconducting processor.

papers.title: Topology-Driven Quantum Architecture Search Framework (2025)
papers.description: two-stage pipeline: search circuit *topology* first, then fine-tune gate types with parameters inherited from stage one. ↳ also relevant to [§8 Weight-Sharing](#8-weight-sharing--supernet-based-qas).

papers.title: Neural Architecture Search Algorithms for Quantum Autoencoders (2025)
papers.description: explicitly combines evolutionary search with reinforcement learning to discover generalizable autoencoder architectures. ↳ also relevant to [§1 Evolutionary](#1-evolutionary--genetic-algorithm-based-qas) and [§2 RL](#2-reinforcement-learning-based-qas).

papers.title: AI Agents for Variational Quantum Circuit Design (2026)
papers.description: an autonomous (LLM-style) agent proposes, trains, and refines candidate circuits with minimal human intervention, rather than using a fixed classical search algorithm.

papers.title: How to find expressible and trainable parameterized quantum circuits? (2026)
papers.description: a property-based (expressibility, trainability, entanglement, complexity) ansatz-selection framework, agnostic to the underlying search procedure.
